name: Paper Loader
description: Loads paper content from the collection, optionally extracting it from PDF.

inputs.name: review_process_name
inputs.description: Name of the review process instance

outputs.name: output_file
outputs.description: Path to the generated paper content artifact

outputs.name: output_type
outputs.description: Type of content extracted (file_path, text, markdown)

extraction_method.label: Extraction Method
extraction_method.description: 'Extracted Content' uses existing MD from source_extracted. 'Force Re-Extract' converts the PDF to markdown using the same method as the collection.

extract_pages_as_image.label: Extract Pages as Image
extract_pages_as_image.description: Convert each page to a PNG file.

force_execution.label: Force Execution
force_execution.description: Force re-extraction even if the output file already exists
